creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hello i build gcc5 with portmaster but build failed on error undefined references.

System : FreeBSD  10.3-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p11 #0: Mon Oct 24 18:47:18 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386


trace/mathoms.o mpdtrace/locale.o mpdtrace/pp_pack.o mpdtrace/pp_sort.o mpdtrace/caretx.o mpdtrace/dquote.o mpdtrace/time64.o mpdtrace/miniperlmain.o dtrace_mini.o -lpthread -lm -lcrypt -lutil
dtrace_mini.o: In function `dtrace_dof_init':
